svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="Z_zaZG8ZcXZQusmPlu8o" name="Page-2"> <mxGraphModel dx="2009" dy="1058" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TD
 %% User Interface
 User((User)) -->|Uploads PDF & Settings| UI[Streamlit UI app.py]
 
 %% PDF Parsing Phase
 UI -->|Sends PDF File| Parser[PDF Parser PyMuPDF / pymupdf4llm]
 Parser -->|Extracts Multi-column Blocks| Filter[Regex Code/Math Filter]
 
 %% Filtering & Caching
 Filter -->|Bypass Translation| Renderer
 Filter -->|Requires Translation| CacheCheck{Check SQLite Cache}
 
 CacheCheck -->|Cache Hit| Renderer
 CacheCheck -->|Cache Miss| ThreadPool[ThreadPoolExecutor Concurrency]
 
 %% Translation Engine
 ThreadPool --> Engine1[Google Translate API]
 Engine1 -.->|Fails/Rate Limit| Engine2[MyMemory API Fallback]
 
 Engine1 -->|Translated Text| CacheWrite[(SQLite Cache WAL Mode)]
 Engine2 -->|Translated Text| CacheWrite
 
 CacheWrite --> Renderer
 
 %% Rendering & Output
 Renderer[PDF Renderer pdf_translator/core.py] -->|1. Smart Bounding Box Expansion| Format1[Layout Engine]
 Format1 -->|2. Dynamic Font Scaling| Format2[HTML/CSS Injector]
 Format2 -->|3. Draw Whiteout & Text| FinalPDF[Reconstructed PDF]
 
 FinalPDF -->|Downloads File| User

 %% Styling
 classDef ui fill:#4A90E2,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef parser fill:#F5A623,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef engine fill:#7ED321,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef db fill:#9013FE,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 
 class UI ui;
 class Parser,Renderer,Format1,Format2 parser;
 class ThreadPool,Engine1,Engine2 engine;
 class CacheCheck,CacheWrite db;",
 "config": null
